title: Roustabouts, Oil and Gas
description: Assemble or repair oil field equipment using hand and power tools. Perform other tasks as needed.

tasks.text: Unscrew or tighten pipes, casing, tubing, and pump rods, using hand and power wrenches and tongs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dismantle and repair oil field machinery, boilers, and steam engine parts, using hand tools and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Guide cranes to move loads about decks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Walk flow lines to locate leaks, using electronic detectors and by making visual inspections, and repair the leaks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Bolt together pump and engine parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move pipes to and from trucks, using truck winches and motorized lifts, or by hand.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean trucks used in the fields.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dig holes, set forms, and mix and pour concrete into forms to make foundations for wood or steel derricks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supply equipment to rig floors as requested and provide assistance to roughnecks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean up spilled oil by bailing it into barrels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dig drainage ditches around wells and storage tanks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut down and remove trees and brush to clear drill sites, to reduce fire hazards, and to make way for roads to sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
